mapper.sql: s.id, s.room_id, s.seat_number, s.seat_name, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time
mapper.select: SELECT , sr.room_name, sr.room_number FROM seat s LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON s.room_id = sr.id WHERE s.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY s.seat_number ASC
SELECT , sr.room_name, sr.room_number FROM seat s LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON s.room_id = sr.id WHERE s.room_id = #{roomId} AND s.status = #{status} ORDER BY s.seat_number ASC
SELECT , sr.room_name, sr.room_number FROM seat s LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON s.room_id = sr.id ORDER BY s.room_id ASC, s.seat_number ASC

SELECT DISTINCT , sr.room_name, sr.room_number FROM seat s LEFT JOIN study_room sr ON s.room_id = sr.id LEFT JOIN reservation r_conflict ON r_conflict.seat_id = s.id AND r_conflict.room_id = #{roomId} AND r_conflict.status != 4 AND r_conflict.status != 3 AND ( (r_conflict.start_time <= #{startTime} AND r_conflict.end_time > #{startTime}) OR (r_conflict.start_time < #{endTime} AND r_conflict.end_time >= #{endTime}) OR (r_conflict.start_time >= #{startTime} AND r_conflict.end_time <= #{endTime}) ) LEFT JOIN long_term_lease l_conflict ON l_conflict.seat_id = s.id AND l_conflict.room_id = #{roomId} AND l_conflict.status = 2 AND DATE(l_conflict.start_date) <= DATE(#{endTime}) AND DATE(l_conflict.end_date) >= DATE(#{startTime}) WHERE s.room_id = #{roomId} AND s.status = 0 AND r_conflict.id IS NULL AND l_conflict.id IS NULL ORDER BY s.seat_number ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (room_id, seat_number, seat_name, status) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{seatNumber}, #{seatName}, #{status})
